title: ericoides intervallare
intro: Ericoides intervallare, also known as Mountain Cranberry, is a low-growing, woody shrub native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mountain Cranberry include its ability to support urinary tract health, reduce inflammation and pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mountain Cranberry include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including urinary tract infections and digestive issues.
